SpaDES.targets 0.0.0.9014
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

extract_outputs()
Extract a stage's output manifest from a completed simList
is_spatial()
Is an object a spatial object?
outputs_spec()
Build a simInit(outputs=) table for terra and RDS objects
provenance_manifest()
Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run
read_spatial()
Read a spatial file written by write_spatial()
run_simspades()
Run one SpaDES stage and return its output manifest
sim_inputs()
Build a simInit(inputs=) table from an upstream manifest
sim_objects()
Load an upstream manifest's outputs into memory for simInit(objects=)
spades_safe_options()
Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs
tar_simspades()
Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets
with_spades_safe_options()
Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set
write_spatial()
Write a spatial object to a file (for a format = "file" target)

Developed by Alex M Chubaty.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
